session.assistant:
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary:
## Summary
Consolidated documentation from 13 erk-learn plans into organized docs. PR: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8755
### Changes Made
**Updated existing docs (7 files):** - `reference/cli-flag-patterns.md` — Replaced stale `require_dangerous_flag` config key with `require_dangerous_flag_for_implicitly_dangerous_operations`, updated code example to use `Ensure.dangerous_flag()` helper - `cli/cli-options-validation.md` — Added section documenting centralized `Ensure.dangerous_flag()` validation pattern - `erk/pr-address-workflows.md` — Verified Phase 0 detection logic, updated audit date - `planning/workflow.md` — Verified menu options match code, updated audit date - `planning/next-steps-output.md` — Added `build_step2_message()` and plan-saved marker format documentation - `architecture/git-plumbing-patterns.md` — Added `retrack_branch()` requirement after `commit_files_to_branch()` - `ci/composite-action-patterns.md` — Added astral-sh/setup-uv migration details
**Created new docs (4 files):** - `pr-operations/pr-body-section-ordering.md` — PR body format (Summary → Key Changes → Files Changed) - `pr-operations/resubmission-workflows.md` — `was_created` flag and idempotent PR resubmission - `erk/same-worktree-navigation.md` — 5 call sites, detection pattern, deletion filtering - `cli/checkout-three-path-logic.md` — Three-path decision tree in `erk br co --for-plan`
**Auto-generated updates:** `erk docs sync` regenerated 10 index/tripwire files (825 total tripwires).
